'''Gymelo''' was an astronomical object<ref name="GATORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> located within the [[Gymelo system/Legends|Gymelo system]], a part of the [[Bakura sector/Legends|Bakura sector]] within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC" /> and [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="TEA" />

In his youth, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bix Arden-Govia]] left behind his pampered life on the nearby [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] and signed on as a [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Youngling/Legends|boy]] aboard a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] out of Gymelo.<ref name="GATORW" /> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">According to ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', [[Bix Arden-Govia]] had returned from his travels to [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was [[Invasion of Bakura|invaded]] by the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> Arden-Govia, who had learned much about the worlds of the [[Shiritoku Spur]] region during his travels, had returned [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to Bakura.<ref name="GATORW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gymelo was first mentioned in the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', which was published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in [[2004]].<ref name="GATORW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Gymelo [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Gymelo, in grid square G-16.<ref name="TEA" />
